headline: Zebra Technologies Empowers Frontline Workers with New DNA Software Platforms and AI-Powered Solutions
summary: NASHVILLE, Tenn., June 02, 2026--Zebra Technologies Corporation (NASDAQ: ZBRA), a global leader in digitizing and automating workflows to deliver intelligent operations, today announced a major expansion of its software portfolio at its annual ZONE customer conference. The company launched new solutions that enable IT leaders and frontline workers to be more efficient and turn data into decisive action.
